name: Thai Rayon Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Rayon Public Company Limited manufactures and sells viscose rayon staple fiber and anhydrous sodium sulphate products in Thailand. It offers viscose rayon staple fiber that is used in textile and non-woven applications under the Birla Cellulose brand name; and anhydrous sodium sulphate for use in detergent, pulp, glass, leather, and textile industries, as well as manufactures and sells pulp. The company also exports its products. Thai Rayon Public Company Limited was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
